Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm in Shinagawa Dungeon...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see Maya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}whoa, did u just get here? we signed on @ the same tiem![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}the weathers nice today huh? let's go outside! (＞' ')＞ ingame, duh[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A gray-colored sky stretches[n]as far as the eye can see.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A barren wasteland lies[n]before Tatsuya and Maya.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is stretching.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}for an apocalypse, the air sure iz nice out here ;P[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}pshyeah right... it's just a game... we should go lvl or sumthing[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i'm so lazy irl tatsu... i havnt even gotten dressed or put on makeup T_T[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya stands at attention![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}AAARGH!!11;alksjf;alskdjfa;slkf im so pissed off rite now![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}Mr. E is such a stupid eh so bee!! t(-_-t)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}i shouldnt have mentioned his name, huh? ＞_＞[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}HAhahHhahHA! roflmao!!1 dun get me busted, k? O=)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}wat do u take me for... you think im drunk 24/7 or sumthin? -_-;[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}im stressed, not drunk... o_O O_o[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems upset.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17004 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}yesss, u get it!! wooooo! tatsuya and maya ftw! xD[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}we must be soulmates ya? hi five! (^ ^) /\ (^ ^)[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems very happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is looking around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}erm, there arnt that many players ne more. most of em left for that new mmo, CoW...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}there were alot of dupers an goldfarmers, but still... =/[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}its good tho cuz it lets us talk about personal things rite? ＞=P[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...maya IS a shy girl, u know... ::blush:: lol[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...see, Mr. E is a teacher whos kinda above me[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}...oh noes! u cant figure out what my job is can u? O_o[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}{f 5 13 10 5 1}well bein drunk does make me stronger =P[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya is enjoying herself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}thats in the GAME im talking about real life ._.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems disappointed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}u get an A+ for reading comprehension today! lol d-^_^[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya seems happy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17002 0 0}hey! i just figured sumthing out o_O[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}when i complain to u, i feel better afterwards! xD[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}from now on we HAVE to party up together, k? promise!! ＞=I[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems Maya feels comfortable[n]talking to me about real life...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали ближчими...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}im so pumped, i think i'll clean teh bathroom xD ...its been 2 months o_O[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya signed back on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 107 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 17005 0 0}dont tell anyone abt that "SOB" stuff, k? its our little secret! ＞_＞[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maya's player signed off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to log out as well.[n]{f 1 1}
